title: feature_state_changed event payload
$comment: Provenance (WU 2.14, F2.4): authored 2026-04-23 in WU 2.9; closes findings F1.1 + F2.9. Fields: from_state (required, enum), to_state (required, enum), trigger (required, freeform string). The event_type itself was also added to event.schema.json enum in WU 2.9.
description: Payload shape for the `feature_state_changed` event emitted by the PM agent (and, for the `plan_review → generating` transition, indirectly on behalf of the human approval gate) on every feature-level state transition the PM agent owns. Feature state vocabulary mirrors `shared/schemas/feature-frontmatter.schema.json` §state enum — the canonical machine-readable source. Added in Phase 2 WU 2.9 to close the event-log gap surfaced in findings F1.1 and F2.9.

from_state.description: Feature state before the transition. Must be a value from the feature state machine in `state-vocabulary.md` and `feature-frontmatter.schema.json`.

to_state.description: Feature state after the transition. Must be a value from the feature state machine in `state-vocabulary.md` and `feature-frontmatter.schema.json`.

trigger.description: Names the action or event that caused this state transition. Freeform string at v1; examples: `plan_ready`, `plan_approved`, `first_round_issues_opened`, `all_tasks_done`, `human_escalation:spec_level_blocker`. Future versions may constrain this to a closed enum per-transition pair.
